title: Tab Height (TabHeight)
text: Tab Height (TabHeight) Height of all tabs in the widget, in character cells. " TabHeight = 0 | DecimalNumber " Value Description DecimalNumber Height in character cells; can be expressed as a decimal fraction, for example .7 or 2.5 . 0 (default) Height of each tab is based on the height of the Default Image , if defined, or the height of the label. If the total widget height is smaller than the tab height, the widget height is used. Usage Dynamic? Yes Supported in Grid? No Dependencies: None Description Use this property only if the tab height does fit the selected font and you want the height to be smaller or larger than the cell height. Using in ProcScript You can use $properties or $fieldproperties to set or get the property and its value. For more information, see $properties and $fieldproperties . $fieldproperties(FLD) = "TabHeight=1.5" Copy Applies To utabex (TabEx) Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
